metadata.description: 6 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: multi-agent build pipeline, documentation, code review, QA testing, frontend design, and dashboard. v4.2.0 adds Completion Gate protocol preventing stale-iteration-artifact leaks at every pipeline-finalizing agent.

plugins.name: claudex
plugins.description: 6 harness commands with 28 specialized agent prompts + 1 helper. v4.2.0 — Completion Gate protocol: Reporter/QA Reporter/Integrator/Refiner/Auditor run stale-artifact scan before declaring complete. v4.1.0 baseline — Meta-Loop default + capability tier detection. Commands: /harness (SINGLE/TEAM + Phase Verifier + Sentinel + Auditor), /harness-docs (5-agent documentation), /harness-review (5-agent code review + gate-gated git handoff), /harness-qa (Playwright QA), /design (3-dial design), /claude-dashboard (statusline).
